title: BTS Gwanghwamun Comeback Concert — Largest Public Concert in South Korean History
detail: BTS performs a free public comeback concert at Gwanghwamun Square in central Seoul — their first full-group performance since October 2022. 22,000 fans receive 'Golden Tickets' for the standing area; approximately 260,000 additional fans fill surrounding streets, making it the largest public concert in South Korean history. The concert is directed by Hamish Hamilton (Super Bowl halftime show, Oscars). RM performs seated after injuring his ankle in rehearsals. The setlist includes ARIRANG tracks plus greatest hits spanning the group's career.

title: Netflix Livestream 'BTS: The Comeback Live | Arirang' Draws 18.4M Viewers
detail: The Gwanghwamun concert livestreams globally on Netflix as 'BTS: The Comeback Live | Arirang.' The stream draws 18.4 million concurrent viewers, tops charts in 24 countries, and enters the weekly top 10 in 80 countries.
